name: ChkStart_LINWakeupReqLengthViolation
title: ChkStart_LINWakeupReqLengthViolation
syntax: dword ChkStart_LINWakeupReqLengthViolation (duration MinLength, duration MaxLength, char[] CaplCallback);
description: Checks the length of LIN wake-up request.
An event will be generated, if a measured length of the wake-up request is out of the specified range.

parameters.description: Minimum length shall not be checked
Maximum length shall not be checked

parameters.name: CaplCallback
parameters.description: Name of CAPL callback function to be called on generated event. In simulation nodes this parameter has to be set. In test modules this parameter is optional.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
